title: coelogyne alpina
intro: Coelogyne alpina, also known as the alpine coelogyne, is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Coelogyne alpina include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels. In herbal preparations, Coelogyne alpina is often used to make teas, infusions, and powders, which are consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
